Bus Timings

Abu Hail Masjid 1 Bus Stop: Location and Details

December 26, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Abu Hail, Masjid 1 Bus Stop is an important transit point situated in Deira, Dubai. This bus stop plays a crucial role in the city’s public transportation system, connecting residents and visitors to various destinations. Its central location and the variety of nearby amenities make it a key access point for navigating the vibrant Deira area.

Address

Deira Dubai United Arab Emirates

Map

View Google directions here.

Situated in the bustling Deira district, the Abu Hail, Masjid 1 Bus Stop is well-integrated into Dubai’s public transit network.

Bus Routes and Timings

The following bus routes service the Abu Hail, Masjid 1 Bus Stop:

Bus Route Bus Station Timings
C14 Al Nahda 1, Sama Residence 12:49 PM
13D Al Qusais Bus Station 1:02 PM
C18 Al Qusais 1 1:08 PM
C14 Al Nahda 1, Sama Residence 1:12 PM
C18 Al Qusais 1 1:20 PM
13D Al Qusais Bus Station 1:21 PM
C14 Al Nahda 1, Sama Residence 1:38 PM
C18 Al Qusais 1 1:41 PM
13D Al Qusais Bus Station 1:43 PM
C18 Al Qusais 1 2:00 PM
13D Al Qusais Bus Station 2:03 PM
C14 Al Nahda 1, Sama Residence 2:03 PM
C14 Al Nahda 1, Sama Residence 2:21 PM
13D Al Qusais Bus Station 2:25 PM
C18 Al Qusais 1 2:25 PM
C14 Al Nahda 1, Sama Residence 2:41 PM
13D Al Qusais Bus Station 2:44 PM
C18 Al Qusais 1 2:47 PM
C14 Al Nahda 1, Sama Residence 3:02 PM
13D Al Qusais Bus Station 3:03 PM
C18 Al Qusais 1 3:07 PM
13D Al Qusais Bus Station 3:21 PM
C14 Al Nahda 1, Sama Residence 3:25 PM
C18 Al Qusais 1 3:27 PM
13D Al Qusais Bus Station 3:43 PM

Bus Route Details

The Abu Hail, Masjid 1 Bus Stop is serviced by the C14, 13D, and C18 routes, providing frequent connectivity throughout the day.

  • C14 Route: Operating between Abu Hail and Al Nahda 1, Sama Residence, buses on this route start at 12:49 PM and run at regular intervals until 3:25 PM, ensuring reliable service for travelers heading to Al Nahda 1.

  • 13D Route: Connecting Abu Hail to Al Qusais Bus Station, the 13D route offers service from 1:02 PM to 3:21 PM, with buses arriving every 15-30 minutes.
  • C18 Route: Serving the route between Abu Hail and Al Qusais 1, the C18 route runs from 1:08 PM to 3:27 PM, providing consistent travel options throughout its operating hours.

Nearby Destinations

The Abu Hail, Masjid 1 Bus Stop is well-placed for accessing a range of local amenities, including dining options, shopping centers, and healthcare facilities. It offers convenient access to:

Restaurants

  • Al Maroof Cafeteria Al Wuheida Dubai: A popular spot for traditional Middle Eastern dishes in a relaxed setting.
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  • Table Talk Restaurant: Known for its diverse menu and casual dining experience.
  • Delight Sagar Restaurant: Offers a variety of flavorful Indian cuisine in a welcoming atmosphere.

ATMs

  • Emirates NBD: Provides banking services and ATM access for cash withdrawals and other transactions.

  • Dubai Islamic Bank: Offers ATM facilities for various banking needs.

Shopping Centers

  • Al Hamriya Shopping Mall: A local shopping destination with a range of stores and dining options.

  • Al Rasheed Mall: Features various shops and amenities for a comprehensive shopping experience.

Healthcare

  • Eatemad Home Healthcare: Provides home healthcare services with a focus on personalized care.

  • icare Blue Clinic: Offers medical consultations and treatments for various health needs.

Nearby Stops

  1. Abu Hail, Masjid 2(267m): 13D, 23, C18

  2. Hamriya Shopping Center 2(374m): C10

  3. Hamriya Shopping Center 1(393m): 13B, 64, C10

  4. Ittehad School 2(499m): 13B, 64, C10

  5. Wuheida, Street 22-2(545m): C28

The Abu Hail, Masjid 1 Bus Stop is a vital component of Dubai’s public transportation network, offering essential connections to key destinations in Deira. Its strategic location, combined with nearby amenities and frequent bus services, makes it a convenient stop for both daily commuters and visitors exploring the area. Whether you’re heading to nearby shopping centers or healthcare facilities, this bus stop serves as a central hub for efficient travel in Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 26, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
